lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲ ਮਹਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਛਾਇਆ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal mehal nahee chhaaeaa maaeaa |
lines.english: His Mansion is eternal and unchanging; it is not a mere reflection of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਏ ਹਮ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਭਾਰਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: prabh paae ham avar na bhaariaa |7|
lines.english: I have found God - I am not searching for any other. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚ ਮਹਲਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saach mehal gur alakh lakhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Guru has shown me the unseen Mansion of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin kai man vasiaa sach soee |
lines.english: That person, within whose mind the True Lord dwells

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਿ ਸੰਤੋਖੇ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: saach santokhe bharam chukaaeaa |8|
lines.english: Through truth and contentment, doubt is dispelled. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Gauree, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਲੁ ਖੋਈ ॥੯॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak saach naam mal khoee |9|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Name washes off the pollution. ||9||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee sangat guramukh hoee |
lines.english: in his company, one becomes Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਰਾਪੈ ਜਾ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam chit raapai jaa kaa |
lines.english: One whose consciousness is permeated with the Lord's Name

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨ ਜਪਹੁ ਅਭਾਗੁ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: raam na japahu abhaag tumaaraa |
lines.english: If you do not meditate on the Lord, it is your own misfortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਦਾਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jug jug daataa prabh raam hamaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In each and every age, the Great Giver is my Lord God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਜੰਪਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਕੀਜੈ ਤਾ ਕਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aupajanp darasan keejai taa kaa |1|
lines.english: - receive the blessing of his darshan in the early light of dawn. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਜਨੁ ਪੂਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramat raam japai jan pooraa |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, the perfect humble beings meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਘਟ ਅਨਹਤ ਬਾਜੇ ਤੂਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tit ghatt anahat baaje tooraa |2|
lines.english: Within their hearts, the unstruck melody vibrates. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨ ਰਾਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan raam bhagat har piaar |
lines.english: Those who worship the Lord and love the Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਦਰਸੁ ਪਰਸਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tin kaa daras paras sukh hoee |4|
lines.english: - gazing upon the blessed vision of their darshan, peace is obtained. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: se prabh raakhe kirapaa dhaar |3|
lines.english: - showering His Mercy, God protects them. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin kai hiradai har har soee |
lines.english: Those whose hearts are filled with the Lord, Har, Har

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ਮਹਿ ਏਕੋ ਰਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sarab jeea meh eko ravai |
lines.english: Among all beings, the One Lord is pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੂਨੀ ਭਵੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: manamukh ahankaaree fir joonee bhavai |5|
lines.english: The eogtistical, self-willed manmukhs wander in reincarnation. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਜੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: so boojhai jo satigur paae |
lines.english: They alone understand, who have found the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਧ ਉਰਧ ਕੀ ਸੰਧਿ ਕਿਉ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: aradh uradh kee sandh kiau jaanai |
lines.english: How can anyone know of the Union between the being below and the Supreme Being above?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੇ ਪਾਏ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: haumai maare gurasabade paae |6|
lines.english: Subduing their ego, they receive the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੰਧਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramukh sandh milai man maanai |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs obtain this Union; their minds are reconciliated. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨ ਤਰੀਐ ॥੮॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: prabh hoe deaal naanak jan tareeai |8|16|
lines.english: When God showers His Mercy, servant Nanak is emancipated. ||8||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਪਾਪੀ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਕਉ ਗੁਣੁ ਕਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: ham paapee niragun kau gun kareeai |
lines.english: I am a worthless sinner, without merit. What merit do I have?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਲਹ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਗਉੜੀ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: solah asattapadeea guaareree gaurree keea |
lines.english: Sixteen Ashtpadheeyaa Of Gwaarayree Gauree||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਗਾਈ ਕਉ ਗੋਇਲੀ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau gaaee kau goeilee raakheh kar saaraa |
lines.english: As the dairy farmer watches over and protects his cows, so does the Lord cherish and protect us, night and day. He blesses the soul with peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤ ਉਤ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: eit ut raakhahu deen deaalaa |
lines.english: I seek Your Sanctuary; please bless me with Your Glance of Grace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਪਾਲਹਿ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹਿ ਆਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਧਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ahinis paaleh raakh lehi aatam sukh dhaaraa |1|
lines.english: Please protect me here and hereafter, O Lord, Merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਹ ਰਵਿ ਰਹੇ ਰਖੁ ਰਾਖਨਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhau teh rav rahe rakh raakhanahaaraa |
lines.english: You are the Giver, and You are the Enjoyer;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਸਰਣਾਗਤਿ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tau saranaagat nadar nihaalaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there You are. Save me, O Savior Lord!

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤੁ ਪਇਆ ਅਧ ਊਰਧੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kirat peaa adh aooradhee bin giaan beechaaraa |
lines.english: According to the karma of past actions, people descend to the depths or rise to the heights, unless they contemplate spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਦਾਤਾ ਭੁਗਤਾ ਤੂੰਹੈ ਤੂੰ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: toon daataa bhugataa toonhai toon praan adhaaraa |2|
lines.english: You are the Support of the breath of life. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਉਪਮਾ ਜਗਦੀਸ ਕੀ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਨ ਅੰਧਿਆਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bin upamaa jagadees kee binasai na andhiaaraa |3|
lines.english: Without the Praises of the Lord of the Universe, the darkness is not dispelled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗੁ ਬਿਨਸਤ ਹਮ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਲੋਭੇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jag binasat ham dekhiaa lobhe ahankaaraa |
lines.english: I have seen the world being destroyed by greed and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਅਪਾਰ ਕੋ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar mehal apaar ko aparanpar soee |
lines.english: The Mansion of the Infinite Lord's Presence is within the home of one's own being. He is beyond any boundaries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa prabh paaeaa sach mukat duaaraa |4|
lines.english: Only by serving the Guru is God obtained, and the true gate of liberation found. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਲੈ ਆਇਆ ਲੇ ਜਾਇ ਕਿਆ ਫਾਸਹਿ ਜਮ ਜਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa lai aaeaa le jaae kiaa faaseh jam jaalaa |
lines.english: What have you brought, and what will you take away, when you are caught by the noose of Death?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਥਿਰੁ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai thir ko nahee boojhai sukh hoee |5|
lines.english: Without the Word of the Shabad, nothing shall endure. Through understanding, peace is obtained. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: guramat naam na veesarai sahaje pat paaeeai |
lines.english: Follow the Guru's Teachings, and do not forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord; you shall automatically obtain honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੋਲੁ ਬਧਾ ਕਸਿ ਜੇਵਰੀ ਆਕਾਸਿ ਪਤਾਲਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: ddol badhaa kas jevaree aakaas pataalaa |6|
lines.english: Like the bucket tied to the rope in the well, you are pulled up to the Akaashic Ethers, and then lowered down to the nether regions of the underworld. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਮਿਲਿ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਈਐ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: antar sabad nidhaan hai mil aap gavaaeeai |7|
lines.english: Deep within the self is the treasure of the Shabad; it is obtained only by eradicating selfishness and conceit. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲੁ ਨ ਚੂਕਈ ਲਾਹਾ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੮॥੧॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak mel na chookee laahaa sach paavai |8|1|17|
lines.english: O Nanak, this Union cannot be broken; the true profit is obtained. ||8||1||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਗੁਣ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare prabh aapanee gun ank samaavai |
lines.english: When God bestows His Glance of Grace, people settle in the Lap of the Virtuous Lord.
